name: Catalina Marketing Corp.
description: Catalina Marketing Corporation is a leading shopper intelligence and performance marketing firm founded in 1983. Headquartered in St. Petersburg, Florida, the company specializes in analyzing real-time purchase data to provide precisely targeted in-store, digital, and TV media solutions. By decoding shopper behavior, Catalina helps consumer-packaged goods (CPG) brands and retailers personalize the shopper journey, maximize customer relationships, and drive sales. With a global presence, the company maintains one of the world's largest online decision support databases, enabling brands to engage their most valuable shoppers through data-driven insights and innovative marketing activation strategies.
